angle: Reactivation: The 'Should I get back on my GLP-1?' angle — directly addressing the #1 reason patients fell off

featured_post.title: Should I Stop My GLP-1?
featured_post.excerpt: What Are GLP-1s? GLP-1s (Zepbound / Mounjaro / tirzepatide, Wegovy / Ozempic / semaglutide) are like supercharged helpers for people with diabetes. They work by mimicking a hormone that tells your brain you're full, slows down your stomach, and helps your pancreas release the right amount of insulin.

reactivation_hook: If you've stopped your GLP-1 medication — you're not alone, and there's no judgment. Many patients stop for reasons that are completely manageable. Let's talk.
